scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: इंग्लिश सीखने के लिए हम कितने सारे वीडियोज़ देखते हैं, है ना? लेकिन सिर्फ सुनने से इंग्लिश बोलना कैसे आएगा? जब तक खुद बोलकर प्रैक्टिस नहीं करोगे, कॉन्फिडेंस नहीं बढ़ेगा। सोचो, हमने अपनी मातृभाषा भी तो लोगों से बात करके ही सीखी थी। अब सुपरनोवा के साथ आप रोज़ इंग्लिश बोलने की प्रैक्टिस कर सकते हैं, वो भी बिना किसी झिझक के।
[We watch so many videos to learn English, right? But how will you learn to speak English just by listening? Until you practice speaking yourself, your confidence won't grow. Think about it, we learned our mother tongue by talking to people too. Now with Supernova, you can practice speaking English daily, that too without any hesitation.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a common frustration: watching videos isn't enough to learn spoken English.
- Emphasizes the importance of actual speaking practice to build confidence.
- Introduces Supernova as a practical, judgment-free solution for daily practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: सिर्फ सुनने से इंग्लिश बोलना कैसे आएगा? Practice Learn

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: इसीलिए मैं आपको सुपरनोवा ऐप ट्राय करने को कहती हूँ। यह एक बेहतरीन AI स्पोकन इंग्लिश ऐप है जो आपको असल जिंदगी के लिए तैयार करता है।
[That's why I tell you to try the Supernova app. It is an excellent AI spoken English app that prepares you for real life.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Transitions from the problem to the solution by introducing the Supernova app.
- Highlights the app's AI-powered features designed for real-world application.
- Sets a warm, encouraging tone as a trusted recommendation.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Say hello to Supernova The Language Learning App GET IT ON Google Play AI Calling Speak With Supernova AI Talk about anything Available 24x7 Live Your AI Speaking Teacher Unlimited Practice Instant Feedback Talk Now

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: सुपरनोवा का AI ट्यूटर बिल्कुल आपके एक दोस्त और पर्सनल कोच की तरह है। आप इंटरव्यू या कस्टमर से बात करने की प्रैक्टिस कर सकते हैं, और वो भी बिना किसी जजमेंट के डर के।
[Supernova's AI tutor is just like a friend and personal coach. You can practice talking for an interview or with a customer, and that too without the fear of any judgment.]
Character C says: Hello! I'm your Supernova AI tutor. Let's practice for your upcoming job interview. Are you ready?
[Hello! I'm your Supernova AI tutor. Let's practice for your upcoming job interview. Are you ready?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Showcases the AI Tutor feature as a safe, judgment-free space to practice.
- Contextualizes the practice around real-world scenarios like job interviews.
- Demonstrates the interactive, conversational nature of the AI.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: AI Calling Speak With Supernova AI Talk about anything Available 24x7 Live Your AI Speaking Teacher Unlimited Practice Instant Feedback Talk Now Supernova AI Speaking Deepak Wait for Your Turn Ongoing Call 00:24 Supernova AI Says Hello! I'm your Supernova AI tutor. Let's practice for your upcoming job interview. Are you ready? HINT I am ready for the interview Chat End Call

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: इसके साथ ही आपको मिलते हैं डेली लेसन्स जो आपको रोज़मर्रा की सिचुएशन्स में सही इंग्लिश बोलना सिखाते हैं। ऑफिस हो या दुकान, अब आप हर जगह कॉन्फिडेंस से बात कर पाएंगे।
[Along with this, you get daily lessons that teach you to speak correct English in everyday situations. Whether it's the office or a shop, now you will be able to talk with confidence everywhere.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the daily lessons feature focused on practical, everyday English.
- Connects the learning to specific, relatable environments (office, shop).
- Reinforces the ultimate goal of speaking with confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: SECTION 1 Unit 1 Lesson 3 आओ सीखें हालचाल पूछना और जवाब देना Next Practice Daily Lessons Real-world situations Practice Recent Lessons Office Conversation Shop Vocabulary Speak with confidence

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: रोज़ प्रैक्टिस करने से आपका कॉन्फिडेंस अपने आप बढ़ेगा। हज़ारों लोग सुपरनोवा के साथ अपने करियर में आगे बढ़ रहे हैं। तो आज ही सुपरनोवा ऐप डाउनलोड करें और अपनी इंग्लिश जर्नी शुरू करें!
[Practicing daily will automatically build your confidence. Thousands of people are moving forward in their careers with Supernova. So download the Supernova app today and start your English journey!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a strong, encouraging call to action to download the app.
- Uses social proof ('thousands of people') without resorting to aggressive hype.
- Ends on an uplifting note, framing it as the start of a positive journey.
